title: Pondify
description: A resource-pack for Pond smp, that changes the whole UI
body:
# Pondify! It's a 64x Resource Pack that changes the whole Minecraft UI to be old papery style > _Made for [Pond SMP](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-pond-modpack)_ ![Smithing Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0a43ad6b67f9d43cc11eed8ae7bc2e5ac93abe1.png) With Support of mods that can be found on the [Pond](https://modrinth.com/modpack/the-pond-modpack) Modpack # ![esc menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34ad5dbf8f448dc37a0843f212225d42066bda97.png)
Supported mods [Inmis](https://modrinth.com/mod/inmis)
[Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)
[Cosmetic Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetic-armor)
[Horseshoes](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseshoes)
[Small Ships](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-ships)
[Superb Steeds](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-steeds)
[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
[Diet](https://modrinth.com/mod/diet)
_And many more to come..._
